eval.correct_rule: Both the entity's class and role independently contribute a fixed number of ritual performances to a shared total count. The class determines the base number of performances, and the role adds a modifier. The total number of times the ritual must be performed before buying the weapon equals base(class) + modifier(role). Changing either attribute shifts the count by its independent contribution, regardless of the other attribute's value.
eval.description: n_extra_steps = base(class) + modifier(role); additive count on process
